TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Chauncey Billups nalecuhan i Denver, Colorado, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Chauncey Billups i 1997 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 1 ku uwac atu silsil 3, namapili' tu nu Boston Celtics putiput. 9 bulad 25 demiad, 1976 a mihca, Chauncey Billups, miunduay.
S.PHON: ¶ƒßaun ¶…ô bir~…ær~…æups nar~…æ…ô ¶uƒßan i d…ôn*…ôr, ¶or~…æorado, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~…æi miunduaj nu amir~…æika nba nisakaput, paƒßanƒßanan tu kawaw ajza. ¶ƒßaun ¶…ô bir~…ær~…æups i **** a miƒß ¶an nba sapapir~…æi î~ ° mimar~…æiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwa ¶ atu sir~…æsir~…æ *, namapir~…æi î~ ° tu nu boston ¶…ôr~…æti ¶s putiput. * bur~…æad ** d…ômiad, **** a miƒß ¶a, ¶ƒßaun ¶…ô bir~…ær~…æups, miunduaj.
S.FORM: Chauncey Billups nalecuhan i Denver, Colorado, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Chauncey Billups i 1997 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 1 ku uwac atu silsil 3, namapili' tu nu Boston Celtics putiput. 9 bulad 25 demiad, 1976 a mihca, Chauncey Billups, miunduay.
